name: Finbar Group Limited
analysis: FRI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7100, stop A$0.6534, target A$0.7997 (1.58:1) — then trail it.
